# CWE-385 vulnerable: Covert Timing Channel (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-385-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

func ValidateWebhookSecret(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, expected string) bool {
	provided := r.Header.Get("X-Webhook-Secret")
	if provided == "" || expected == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing secret", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return false
	}
	if len(provided) != len(expected) {
		return false
	}
	for i := 0; i < len(provided); i++ {
		if provided[i] != expected[i] {
			return false
		}
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return true
}

func WebhookAuthHandler(expected string) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if !ValidateWebhookSecret(w, r, expected) {
			http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		}
	}
}
